title: Clergy
description: Conduct religious worship and perform other spiritual functions associated with beliefs and practices of religious faith or denomination. Provide spiritual and moral guidance and assistance to members.

tasks.text: Pray and promote spirituality.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and deliver sermons or other talks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read from sacred texts, such as the Bible, Torah, or Koran.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and lead regular religious services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct people who seek conversion to a particular faith.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Share information about religious issues by writing articles, giving speeches, or teaching.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel individuals or groups concerning their spiritual, emotional, or personal needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer religious rites or ordinances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare people for participation in religious ceremonies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Visit people in homes, hospitals, or prisons to provide them with comfort and support.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train leaders of church, community, or youth groups.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or lead religious education programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study and interpret religious laws, doctrines, or traditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to requests for assistance during emergencies or crises.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct special ceremonies, such as weddings, funerals, or confirmations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Devise ways in which congregational membership can be expanded.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with committees or individuals to address financial or administrative issues pertaining to congregations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer people to community support services, psychologists, or doctors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize or engage in interfaith, community, civic, educational, or recreational activities sponsored by or related to religious programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as overseeing building management, ordering supplies, contracting for services or repairs, or supervising the work of staff members or volunteers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in fundraising activities to support congregational activities or facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
